html:
Turkey Dinner is a Meat Food item cooked in the Crock Pot by adding 2 Raw Drumsticks, >1 units of Meat, and 0.5 units of Fruit or Vegetable. Any Drumsticks contribute to its meat demand. It takes 60 seconds to cook.

Adding a Mandrake may result in Mandrake Soup.

Using Fried Drumsticks may result in Meatballs, as the recipe strictly requires uncooked drumsticks.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants and Shipwrecked DLCs, Turkey Dinner increases the player's perceived temperature by 1 degree per second for 10 seconds when consumed.

In the Hamlet DLC, Turkey Dinner can be bought for 10 Oincs at The Sterling Trough Deli.

Prerequisites

  • Requires: 
  • Requires:
  • Requires: or

Recipe

×2

×0.25

×2

×0.25

Examples

×2

×2

×3

50% chance to result in Mandrake Soup.

×2

50% chance to result in Monster Lasagna.

Tips

  • It is recommended to cook this Crock Pot recipe rather than to eat two Drumsticks on their own, as it restores more Health and Hunger than most of their recipe ingredients.
  • Keep your drumsticks uncooked for this recipe, as this will not work with Fried Drumsticks.

Trivia

  • During the Pig Fiesta event in the Hamlet DLC, Turkey Dinner takes on an even more festive appearance.
  • While the Turkey Dinner can be made with either Fruits or Vegetables, the appearance of the item in-game appears to show berries in a similar appearance to cranberry sauce.

Gallery

  • Turkey Dinner in the Winter's Feast update poster.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

'''Turkey Dinner''' is a [[Meats|Meat]] [[Food]] item cooked in the [[Crock Pot]] by adding 2 [[Drumstick|Raw Drumstick]]s, >1 units of  [[Meats|Meat]], and 0.5 units of [[Fruit]] or [[Vegetable]]. Any Drumsticks contribute to its meat demand. It takes 60 seconds to cook.

Adding a [[Mandrake]] may result in [[Mandrake Soup]]. 

Using Fried [[Drumstick]]<nowiki/>s may result in [[Meatballs]], as the recipe strictly requires uncooked drumsticks.

== [[File:Gift Icon.png|32px]] Downloadable Content ==
In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' and ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLCs, Turkey Dinner increases the player's perceived temperature by 1 degree per second for 10 seconds when consumed.

In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, Turkey Dinner can be bought for 10 [[Oinc]]s at [[The Sterling Trough Deli]].

== Prerequisites ==
* Requires: [[File:Drumstick.png|link=Drumstick]]
* Requires: [[File:Meats Crock Pot.png|link=Meats]]
* Requires: [[File:Vegetables Crock Pot(No Mandrake).png|link=Vegetables]] or [[File:Fruits Crock Pot.png|link=Fruit]]

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Drumstick
|count1 = 2
|item3 = Meats
|item4 = Vegetables
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Turkey Dinner
|count3=0.25}}

{{Recipe

|count1 = 2
|item3 = Meats
|item4 = Fruit
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Turkey Dinner
|count3=0.25}}

== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Drumstick
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Monster Meat
|item3 = Mushrooms
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Turkey Dinner
}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Drumstick
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Morsel
|item3 = Berries
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Turkey Dinner
}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Drumstick
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Mandrake
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Turkey Dinner
|note = 50% chance to result in [[Mandrake Soup]].
}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Drumstick
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Monster Meats
|item3 = Durians
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Turkey Dinner
|note = 50% chance to result in [[Monster Lasagna]].
}}

== {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* It is recommended to cook this Crock Pot recipe rather than to eat two [[Drumstick|Drumsticks]] on their own, as it restores more [[Health]] and [[Hunger]] than most of their recipe ingredients.
* Keep your drumsticks uncooked for this recipe, as this will not work with [[Drumstick|Fried Drumsticks]].

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
[[File:Turkey Dinner (Pig Fiesta).png|right]]
* During the [[Pig Fiesta]] event in the ''Hamlet'' DLC, Turkey Dinner takes on an even more festive appearance.
* While the Turkey Dinner can be made with either Fruits or Vegetables, the appearance of the item in-game appears to show [[berries]] in a similar appearance to cranberry sauce.
{{clear}}
